mapper.update: UPDATE sys_table_operation SET table_code = #{tableCode}, operation_code = #{operationCode}, operation_name = #{operationName}, operation_type = #{operationType}, icon = #{icon}, permission = #{permission}, position = #{position}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, status = #{status}, menu_id = #{menuId}, event_type = #{eventType}, event_config = #{eventConfig}, confirm_message = #{confirmMessage} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_table_operation SET sort_order = #{sortOrder} WHERE id = #{id}
